NVDA.notes: High-conviction add on a deeper drop into the 200-day MA (~$189 as of 12 Jun). Daily trend about to flip positive.

GOOG.notes: Pulling back from highs, looking for support at the 50-day MA (~$359 as of 12 Jun).

TSLA.notes: Major support zone (~$368) for TSLA stacking.

PLTR.notes: Psychological/whole-number support at $100; also reclaiming the ATR Level 4 area (proprietary, not priced here).

QQQ.notes: Finding support on the rising 50-day MA (~$709 as of 2 Jul; drifts). Lower highs / higher lows — ranging, not crashing.
